'''Deena Kinnet''' was a wealthy [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. She worked as a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]]. Later in her life, she became a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] working for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She owned [[Q-3PO]].
